rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §33.202, which governs UIL extracurricular activity safety training requirements.
quote: The University Interscholastic League shall develop and adopt an extracurricular activity safety training program as provided by this section.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this safety training statute.
